user_story: As an analyst I open the dashboard so I can see all my cases
expected_behaviour: GET /cases returns JSON array with caseId,name,createdAt,investigator,status; dashboard case selector populated

expected_behaviour: POST /cases {caseId,name,investigator} creates a case dir and returns the new caseId; dashboard switches to it

user_story: As an analyst I synthesize findings from the timeline

errors: concurrent state saves shared one .tmp -> malformed investigation.json -> 500 on every state-loading endpoint
fix: atomicWrite unique tmp filename + per-case StateLock + synthesize lost-update guard
